text: I'm building a B2B SaaS that helps sales teams track and prioritize outreach. Solo founders adopt first; I want to know if sales managers will follow.
Riskiest assumption: that solo founders adopt before sales managers do, and that the dashboard is enough to convince a manager during a 15-minute trial.
The aha moment is when someone imports their first contacts and sees the dashboard light up with auto-prioritized outreach suggestions.
